title: Chocolate
description: Heavy-weighted modpack focused on making Minecraft look as stunning as possible all while keeping the vanilla feel fully intact. This modpack includes visual enhancement mods, a full sound overhaul, performance optimization and pre-installed shaderpacks!
body:
**Chocolate** is a _heavy-weight_, immersive visual and auditory overhaul of Minecraft. The pack is designed to push the game’s aesthetics to their limits while preserving the core vanilla gameplay experience. It’s perfect for players who love the original feel of Minecraft but want it to look breathtakingly beautiful.

**Key Features**

- Stunning Visual Enhancements: Includes full particle system overhaul, advanced shaders with custom settings, dynamic lighting and realistic sound physics to deliver a cinematic look and feel.
- Vanilla Gameplay Preservation: No major gameplay overhauls. Mechanics and progression remain true to the vanilla experience.
- Performance Tweaks for Stability: Optimizations and performance mods are included to help balance the visual upgrades and keep the game playable on capable hardware.
- Curated Mod Selection: Every mod is carefully chosen to enhance immersion without adding clutter or changing how Minecraft plays. Think enhanced biome generation, improved ambient sounds, and small but effective aesthetic tweaks.
- Shader Pack Compatibility: Designed with full support and to look great with popular shaders like Complementary Reimagined, BSL, or SEUS to take full advantage of modern GPUs.

**Why Chocolate?**

If you’ve ever wished Minecraft looked like a modern AAA game without losing the nostalgic, cozy feeling of vanilla, this is the modpack for you. Whether you’re building, exploring, or just relaxing in your world, you’ll experience Minecraft in its most visually stunning form.
